title: Endless Suffering SMP
description: E-SMP is a modpack designed for modded survival multiplayer that is fun and engaging for both beginners and experienced players. Inspired by Hermitcraft, it adds new twists and challenges to the base game without heavily changing it.
body:
The Endless Suffering SMP (E-SMP) is a modpack which aims to provide a modded survival multiplayer experience that is both fun, and engaging to play. E-SMP is designed to be simple for the average Vanilla survialist, while adding a modded twist for those who are looking for an experience that doesn't heavily change the base game, but adds some new twists for a bit of flavor and challenge.

E-SMP is inspired by the Hermitcraft modpack created originally by xisuma, called [Xisuma's Hermitcraft Enhancements](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/xisumas-hermitcraft-mods), and aims to expand off of it with a Vanilla+ experience. While this modpack is created with the express intent for use within the Endless Suffering community, with a lightly modded server anyone can recreate the experience for themself and their friends. 

This modpack is also being periodically updated and upgraded with different QoL changes without making too many jarring changes that will cause whiplash. Like Hermitcraft, the modpack's intention is to be present for "seasons," with each major modpack update being to either upgrade to a newer version of Minecraft, and/or to prepare for a new season of gameplay. We (the E-SMP Team) strive to keep this modpack relevant.
